Title: Interface Support
Definition: The processing unit shall support required communication interfaces.

Title: Processing Capability
Definition: The processing unit shall process instrument data in real time without loss.

Title: Memory Capacity
Definition: The processing unit shall store at least 24 hours of instrument data.

Title: Data Throughput
Definition: The processing unit shall support required data throughput to spacecraft.

Title: Mode Control
Definition: The processing unit shall manage instrument operational modes.

Title: Calibration Processing
Definition: The processing unit shall process calibration data and apply corrections.

Title: Command Handling
Definition: The processing unit shall interpret and route commands internally.
